title: helygia javanica
intro: Helygia javanica, also known as Javan hoya or Javan waxflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Helygia javanica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Helygia javanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
